name: Retwik Satya Teja
summary: Systems Engineer / .NET Developer with 4 years of experience operating Microsoft 365-scale Azure infrastructure. Skilled in Azure VMSS, Azure DevOps CI/CD, AKS/Docker, Bicep/ARM IaC, KQL-based observability, and .NET Framework development. AZ-400, AZ-204, AZ-900 certified.
experienceHighlights: Diagnosed a production incident on a 75-instance Azure VMSS where Azure Front Door was reusing persistent connections to only 4 instances, causing IIS saturation and 503 errors despite healthy probe status; used KQL/Log Analytics to isolate root cause and drove post-incident action items including per-instance alerting.

Resolved persistent NuGet/MSBuild build failures in a .NET Framework 4.7.2 solution caused by TFM incompatibilities, incorrect Azure DevOps pipeline tooling, and stale HintPaths, restoring reliable CI builds.
Configured Azure SQL Server Entra ID-only authentication across Portal, CLI, PowerShell, and Bicep for improved security posture.
Operate and support Microsoft 365-scale Azure infrastructure spanning VMSS, AKS/Docker, and Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines.
Certified in AZ-400 (DevOps Engineer Expert), AZ-204 (Developer Associate), and AZ-900 (Azure Fundamentals).
